name: Super Retail Group Limited
analysis: SUL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$12.6700, stop A$11.0088, target A$14.4720 (1.08:1) — then trail it.
